name: castleChat
description: castleChat is a real-time chat web application composed of a React 19 single-page frontend and a Spring Boot 3.5.5 / Java 17 microservices backend (gRPC-based websocket-gateway, channel-engine, and domain-service modules sharing common-contract and common-redis libraries), with Prometheus/Grafana monitoring. Note: this project has over 100 source files; consider scoping analysis to a subdirectory for faster results.
